response.justification: Candidate is a capable full-stack engineer with strong web/mobile experience, but the role requires 8 years of C++ and deep experience in large-scale distributed compute infrastructure. Resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and primarily JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang work since. No demonstrated cloud compute platform leadership or formal technical-leadership track record at the scale required.
strengths: Long, diverse engineering tenure with founder/staff-level roles
Strong testing, TDD, and craftsmanship discipline plus teaching/mentoring via workshops
Some low-latency, high-throughput systems exposure (Sociomantic micro-services)
concerns: Far short of the 8 years C++ minimum requirement
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed-systems leadership shown
Limited formal tech-lead experience mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed infra leadership
Strong software craftsmanship and mentoring background
